zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Arundel於大約1351年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir Edmund Arundel24歲，母親Sybil Montagu21歲。她於1371年與Sir Richard Sergeaux II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年9月13日在英國可瓦爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 馬比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Arundel于大约1351年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir Edmund Arundel24岁，母亲Sybil Montagu21岁。她于1371年与Sir Richard Sergeaux II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年9月13日在英国可瓦爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Arundel was born about 1351, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir Edmund Arundel, was 24 and her mother, Sybil Montagu, was 21. She married Sir Richard Sergeaux II in 1371, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 13 September 1399, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Arundel est née environ 1351, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Arundel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sybil Montagu, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Sergeaux II en 1371, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 septembre 1399, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Mary Chapel of Colquite, St Mabyn,: St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Arundel um 1351 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmund Arundel 24 und ihre Mutter Sybil Montagu 21. Sie hat 1371 in England Sir Richard Sergeaux II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. September 1399 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Arundel è nata il circa 1351 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir Edmund Arundel, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Sybil Montagu, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Sergeaux II nel 1371, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1399, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillipa Arundelが約1351年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Arundelは24歳，母Sybil Montaguは21歳であった。1371年にイギリスでSir Richard Sergeaux IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1399年9月13日にイギリスコルンワルで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Arundel(이)가 대략 1351년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund Arundel(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Montagu(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1371년 영국에서 Sir Richard Sergeaux II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 9월 13일 영국 코른월에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipa Arundel nasceu aproximadamente 1351, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Arundel, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Montagu, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Sergeaux II em 1371, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1399, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Arundel родилась около 1351 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund Arundel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Montagu, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Sergeaux II в 1371 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 13 сентября 1399 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Richard Sergeaux II en 1371, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1399, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
